question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the following words:

Ubiquitous, Esoteric, Obfuscate, Tenacity, Lethargic
solution_html:
Ubiquitous – Mobile phones are now ubiquitous, found in even the most remote villages.

Esoteric – The professor’s lecture on quantum physics included many esoteric terms.

Obfuscate – Politicians sometimes obfuscate the truth with vague language.

Tenacity – Her tenacity helped her overcome all the academic hurdles.

Lethargic – After staying up all night, he felt too lethargic to attend class.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5×5) = 2.5 marks for making meaningful and correct sentences with the given words.

question_html:
Change the following sentences as directed:

(a) No other memory is as cherished as this one. (Comparative)

(b) No other mountain in the world is as high as Everest. (Comparative)

(c) I only wanted to help. (Negative)

(d) The teacher said, “I will explain this tomorrow.” (Indirect speech)

(e) He saved money to buy a bicycle. (Complex)
solution_html:
(a) This memory is more cherished than any other.

Or, This is more cherished than any other memory.

(b) Everest is higher than any other mountain in the world.

(c) I did not want to do anything but help.

(d) The teacher said that he would explain that the next day.

(e) He saved money so that he could buy a bicycle.

Marks Distribution

(0.5×5) =2.5 marks for changing the sentences as direction.

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘Ways to Reduce Carbon Footprint’.
solution_html:
Ways to Reduce Carbon Footprint

Reducing our carbon footprint is essential to combat the escalating threat of climate change. Individuals and communities must adopt sustainable practices to minimize greenhouse gas emissions. Simple actions such as conserving energy by using efficient appliances and switching to renewable energy sources can substantially lower carbon output. Additionally, reducing reliance on fossil fuels by opting for public transportation, cycling, or walking helps decrease air pollution. Waste management, including recycling and composting, further mitigates environmental impact. Consuming locally produced and plant-based foods can also reduce the carbon footprint associated with long-distance transportation and livestock farming. Governments and organizations play a vital role by implementing policies that encourage eco-friendly technologies and conservation efforts. Collective commitment to these measures is imperative to preserve natural resources and ensure a sustainable future for coming generations. Every small step contributes to the larger goal of protecting our planet.

Marks Distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the title “Ways to Reduce Carbon Footprint”.

01 mark for explaining the importance of reducing carbon footprint and sustainable practices.

1.5 marks for describing specific actions like energy conservation, transportation choices, and waste management.

01 mark for mentioning the role of governments and organizations.

01 mark for emphasizing on collective commitment and the importance of these measures for the future.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

*0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 1 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
